steps.action: Open compare.html and wait for data to load
steps.expected: Page loads with default fixture showing Chart tab
steps.observed: Page loaded with default fixture, Chart tab active, sidebar shows FIXTURE dropdown with 'Default (Phase 3)' selected

steps.expected: Dropdown lists fixture options including variant
steps.observed: Dropdown has two options: 'Default (Phase 3)' and 'Variant Comparison'

steps.expected: Config panel shows variant dropdown listing a8ra_v1 and luxalgo_v1, styled consistently with dark theme
steps.observed: Sidebar now shows: FIXTURE dropdown='Variant Comparison', VARIANTS section with teal swatch 'a8ra_v1' and amber swatch 'luxalgo_v1', CONFIGS showing 'locked_a8ra_v1 (a8ra_v1)' and 'locked_luxalgo_v1 (luxalgo_v1)'. All styled with dark theme (#0a0e17 background, consistent color palette).

steps.action: Start with default fixture loaded, note markers and detection counts
steps.expected: Default configs shown (candidate_relaxed, current_locked), detection summary shows single total
steps.observed: Default fixture shows 'candidate_relaxed' and 'current_locked' configs, detection summary Total: 252 (single column). Config legend shows 'candidate_relaxed' and 'current_locked'.

steps.expected: Detection markers reload, marker positions change visibly, detection count summary updates
steps.observed: Chart reloads with new data. Sidebar now shows two-column detection summary: a8ra_v1 (Total: 261) vs luxalgo_v1 (Total: 272). MSS counts differ (13 vs 17), Order Block counts differ (10 vs 17). Config legend now shows 'a8ra_v1' and 'luxalgo_v1'. Markers on chart visibly changed with teal/amber color coding.
Original configs restored: 'candidate_relaxed' and 'current_locked' with Total: 252. Chart markers reverted to original positions and colors.

steps.action: Load variant fixture and switch to Stats tab
steps.expected: Stats tab headers include variant name
steps.observed: Stats tab shows 'Detection Statistics — Displacement' header. Two side-by-side config cards: 'locked_a8ra_v1 (a8ra_v1)' (teal) and 'locked_luxalgo_v1 (luxalgo_v1)' (amber). Session Distribution chart legend shows both variant-qualified names.

steps.expected: MSS stats show different values for each variant
steps.observed: MSS Detection Statistics shows locked_a8ra_v1 (a8ra_v1): 44 detections, 8.8±3.1/day vs locked_luxalgo_v1 (luxalgo_v1): 73 detections, 14.6±3.1/day. Direction Split and Session Distribution charts both show side-by-side variant comparison.

steps.action: Load variant fixture and view Chart tab
steps.expected: Teal markers for a8ra_v1 and amber markers for luxalgo_v1 visible at the same time, legend maps colors to variants
steps.observed: Chart shows both teal (a8ra_v1) and amber/yellow (luxalgo_v1) detection markers simultaneously overlaid on the candlestick chart. Top controls bar legend shows: teal square 'a8ra_v1', amber square 'luxalgo_v1'. Sidebar VARIANTS section also lists both with matching color swatches. Detection summary table has two columns (a8ra_v1, luxalgo_v1) showing per-primitive counts.
Page loaded with default fixture, Chart tab active, configs: candidate_relaxed, current_locked

steps.expected: Chart shows different markers with variant colors
steps.observed: Variant fixture loaded. Chart shows teal (a8ra_v1) and amber (luxalgo_v1) markers. Sidebar shows VARIANTS section, CONFIGS with variant names in parentheses, detection summary with two variant columns.

steps.expected: Stats tab shows variant names in headers
steps.observed: Stats tab shows 'locked_a8ra_v1 (a8ra_v1)' and 'locked_luxalgo_v1 (luxalgo_v1)' in card headers. Side-by-side comparison charts and tables present.

steps.action: Switch back to Chart tab and select 'Default (Phase 3)' fixture
steps.observed: Default fixture restored. Configs reverted to 'candidate_relaxed' and 'current_locked'. Variant section disappeared from sidebar. Detection summary reverted to original counts (Total: 252).

steps.action: Check console errors throughout entire flow
steps.observed: No console errors reported at any point during the flow

frictions.description: The fixture dropdown uses value='variant' internally but the ref-based select command failed due to ambiguous element matching (3 comboboxes on page). Had to use JavaScript eval to change the dropdown value and dispatch change event.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to directly set select element value and dispatch change event via document.getElementById('fixture-select')

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All variant UI features work correctly — fixture switcher loads variant data, sidebar shows variant names with color-coded swatches, chart displays both teal (a8ra_v1) and amber (luxalgo_v1) markers simultaneously, Stats tab shows variant-qualified headers with different detection statistics, and round-trip fixture switching restores original state cleanly. No console errors encountered.
